stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true about the navigation specification RNP 1?

options.a: It may be used for the initial part of a STAR outside 30 NM and above MSA.
options.b: RNP 1 is limited to use on STARs, SIDs, the initial and intermediate segments of Instrument Approach Procedures and the missed approach after the initial climb phase.
options.c: RNP 1 is used in all phases of flight except for oceanic/remote and final approach, and is primarily intended for helicopter operations.
options.d: It permits a range of scalable RNP lateral and longitudinal navigation accuracies.
